title: AGENTS.md
text: pkgskills — AI Skills R Package Development collection curated, opinionated skills agent instructions improve agentic coding R packages. https://github.com/api2r/pkgskills, https://api2r.github.io/pkgskills/

title: AGENTS.md
text: project follows standard R package conventions key directories: pkgskills/ ├── R/ # R source code │ ├── pkgskills-package.R # Auto-generated package docs │ ├── aaa-shared_params.R # Shared @inheritParams definitions │ ├── aaa-conditions.R # Auto-generated package docs │ ├── utils.R # Shared internal helpers │ └── *.R # Function definitions, 1 file ~= 1 exported function ├── inst/templates/ # Templates agent setup ├── .github/ │ ├── ISSUE_TEMPLATE/ # GitHub issue templates │ ├── skills/ # Agent skill definitions │ └── workflows/ # CI/CD configurations ├── tests/testthat/ # Test suite ├── man/ # Generated documentation ├── AGENTS.md # Main agent setup file ├── DESCRIPTION # Package metadata ├── NAMESPACE # Auto-generated export information ├── NEWS.md # Changelog └── Various config files # .gitignore, codecov.yml, etc.

title: AGENTS.md
text: feature, fix, refactor: Update packages: pak::pak() Run tests — confirm passing changes: devtools::test(reporter = "check"). fail, stop ask. Plan — identify affected R files; check new exports needed (→ r-code skill). Test first — write failing test, implement (→ tdd-workflow skill): devtools::test(filter = "name", reporter = "check"). Implement — minimal code pass tests. Refactor — clean , keep tests green. Document — use document skill new/changed exports. Verify: Run air format ., wrapping : devtools::check(error_on = "warning"). Resolve warnings, errors, NOTEs. News — add bullet top NEWS.md (dev heading): User-facing changes . 1 line, end . Present tense, positive framing, function names (backticks + ()) near start: * `fn()` now accepts ... * Fixed ... Issue/contributor final period: * `fn()` now accepts ... (@user, #N). Get username: gh api user --jq .login

title: AGENTS.md
text: Load skills @.github/skills user triggers .

title: AGENTS.md
text: R console: use --quiet --vanilla. Always run air format . generating R code. Comments explain , . writing reviewing code, load relevant skills (usually r-code, tdd-workflow, document).

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Examples behavior contributes positive environment community include: Demonstrating empathy kindness toward people respectful differing opinions, viewpoints, experiences Giving gracefully accepting constructive feedback Accepting responsibility apologizing affected mistakes, learning experience Focusing best just us individuals, overall community Examples unacceptable behavior include: use sexualized language imagery, sexual attention advances kind Trolling, insulting derogatory comments, personal political attacks Public private harassment Publishing others’ private information, physical email address, without explicit permission conduct reasonably considered inappropriate professional setting

title: Contributing to pkgskills
text: want make bigger change, ’s good idea first file issue make sure someone team agrees ’s needed. ’ve found bug, please file issue illustrates bug minimal reprex (also help write unit test, needed).

title: Contributing to pkgskills
text: Fork package clone onto computer. haven’t done , recommend using usethis::create_from_github("api2r/pkgskills", fork = TRUE). Install development dependencies devtools::install_dev_deps(), make sure package passes R CMD check running devtools::check(). R CMD check doesn’t pass cleanly, ’s good idea ask help continuing. Create Git branch pull request (PR). recommend using usethis::pr_init("brief-description--change"). Make changes, commit git, create PR running usethis::pr_push(), following prompts browser. title PR briefly describe change. body PR contain Fixes #issue-number. user-facing changes, add bullet top NEWS.md (.e. just first header). Follow style described https://style.tidyverse.org/news.html.

title: Contributing to pkgskills
text: New code follow tidyverse style guide. can use styler package apply styles, please don’t restyle code nothing PR. use roxygen2, Markdown syntax, documentation. use testthat unit tests. Contributions test cases included easier accept.

title: Getting help with pkgskills
text: Start making minimal reproducible example using reprex package. haven’t heard used reprex , ’re treat! Seriously, reprex make R-question-asking endeavors easier (pretty insane ROI five ten minutes ’ll take learn ’s ). additional reprex pointers, check Get help! section tidyverse site.

title: Getting help with pkgskills
text: Armed reprex, next step figure ask. ’s question: ’s best ask R4DS Online Learning Community Slack. options include Posit Community, StackOverflow. people answer questions. ’s bug: ’re right place, file issue. ’re sure: let community help figure ! problem bug feature request, can easily return report . opening new issue, sure search issues pull requests make sure bug hasn’t reported /already fixed development version. default, search pre-populated :issue :open. can edit qualifiers (e.g. :pr, :closed) needed. example, ’d simply remove :open search issues repo, open closed.
